user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Scrambled Eggs with Whole-Grain Toast
fields.short_description: Fluffy scrambled eggs served with whole-grain toast, sautéed cherry tomatoes and spinach — a simple, protein-forward classic breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk 2–3 eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper. Melt a small knob of butter or a teaspoon of olive oil in a nonstick pan, add the eggs, and gently scramble to soft, creamy curds. Quickly sauté halved cherry tomatoes and a handful of spinach in the same pan for 1–2 minutes and season lightly. Serve eggs alongside 1–2 slices of toasted whole-grain bread; top with a sprinkle of chives or cracked black pepper. Optional: add a thin slice of avocado for healthy fats.
fields.nutrition_note: High-quality protein from eggs supports morning satiety and muscle maintenance; whole-grain toast provides fiber and steady carbohydrates; spinach and tomatoes add vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Adding avocado supplies heart-healthy monounsaturated fats. Overall a balanced, nutrient-dense classic breakfast.

insertion_point.reasoning: Appended to Father Day 2 breakfast options to provide a straightforward, classic egg-based choice on the same day as the Smoky Base Pork Dinner. Position -1 places it after existing breakfast items without replacing them.
